inclusion_criteria: Population: Adults (≥18 years) with treatment-resistant unipolar major depressive disorder (non-response to ≥2 adequate antidepressant trials) diagnosed using standardized criteria (DSM/ICD); trials must exclude bipolar or psychotic depression or report data separately for the eligible subgroup.

Study design and comparison: Randomized controlled trials (parallel-group or cross-over) comparing eligible pharmacologic or neuromodulatory treatments (e.g., ECT, rTMS/TBS, ketamine/esketamine, aripiprazole, minocycline, and other antidepressant interventions) versus placebo or sham (with or without background standard antidepressant therapy).
Outcomes: Report response rate (e.g., ≥50% reduction on a validated depression scale) or provide sufficient data to derive response for the eligible population, enabling calculation of odds ratios.
Blinding: Placebo/sham-controlled and blinded where feasible; for ECT, randomized sham-controlled designs are eligible.
exclusion_criteria: Non-randomized, uncontrolled, open-label, single-arm, quasi-experimental, or active-comparator-only studies without a placebo/sham arm; case series/reports, reviews, editorials, or conference abstracts without extractable RCT data.
Samples including bipolar disorder, schizoaffective disorder, or psychotic depression, or mixed-diagnosis studies where data for unipolar non-psychotic TRD cannot be isolated.
Participants not meeting TRD criteria (fewer than two failed adequate antidepressant trials) or TRD status not clearly defined/reportable for the analyzed sample.
Does not report response outcomes or lacks sufficient data to compute response for the eligible group.
screening_criteria.description: Screening layer to identify randomized, placebo/sham-controlled trials of pharmacologic and neuromodulatory treatments in adults with treatment-resistant unipolar depression, extracting response rate for odds ratio estimation.

included_articles.title: Oral esketamine in patients with treatment-resistant depression: a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial with open-label extension.
Esketamine Monotherapy in Adults With Treatment-Resistant Depression: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
Efficacy and Safety of Intranasal Esketamine Adjunctive to Oral Antidepressant Therapy in Treatment-Resistant Depression: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
Efficacy of prefrontal theta-burst stimulation in refractory depression: a randomized sham-controlled study.

Efficacy and safety of fixed doses of intranasal Esketamine as an add-on therapy to Oral antidepressants in Japanese patients with treatment-resistant depression: a phase 2b randomized clinical study.
Effect of Minocycline on Depressive Symptoms in Patients With Treatment-Resistant Depression: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
